mapper.select: SELECT s.结算单编号, s.结算单单号, s.结算金额, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN i.发票性质 = '蓝字' THEN r.关联金额 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS blue_sum, COALESCE(ABS(SUM(CASE WHEN i.发票性质 = '红字' THEN r.关联金额 ELSE 0 END)), 0) AS red_sum, (COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN i.发票性质 = '蓝字' THEN r.关联金额 ELSE 0 END), 0) - COALESCE(ABS(SUM(CASE WHEN i.发票性质 = '红字' THEN r.关联金额 ELSE 0 END)), 0)) AS net_amount, (s.结算金额 - (COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN i.发票性质 = '蓝字' THEN r.关联金额 ELSE 0 END), 0) - COALESCE(ABS(SUM(CASE WHEN i.发票性质 = '红字' THEN r.关联金额 ELSE 0 END)), 0))) AS can_invoice_amount, (COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN i.发票性质 = '蓝字' THEN r.关联金额 ELSE 0 END), 0) - COALESCE(ABS(SUM(CASE WHEN i.发票性质 = '红字' THEN r.关联金额 ELSE 0 END)), 0)) AS can_red_amount FROM SETTLEMENT s LEFT JOIN SETTLEMENT_INVOICE_REL r ON s.结算单编号 = r.结算单编号 LEFT JOIN INVOICE i ON r.发票编号 = i.发票编号 WHERE s.结算单编号 = #{settlementId} GROUP BY s.结算单编号, s.结算单单号, s.结算金额

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN i.发票性质 = '蓝字' THEN r.关联金额 ELSE 0 END), 0) - COALESCE(ABS(SUM(CASE WHEN i.发票性质 = '红字' THEN r.关联金额 ELSE 0 END)), 0) AS net_amount FROM SETTLEMENT_INVOICE_REL r LEFT JOIN INVOICE i ON r.发票编号 = i.发票编号 WHERE r.结算单编号 = #{settlementId} AND r.status IN ('BOUND', 'ASSOCIATED', '有效')
